name: Energy Unit
helpText: Unit displayed on the Y-axis and in tooltips.

name: Rolling Window (Days)
helpText: Number of past days to display. Common: 7, 14, 30, 90.

name: Actual Energy Telemetry Key
helpText: Telemetry key for actual daily energy production.

name: P50 Forecast Telemetry Key
helpText: Telemetry key for daily P50 forecast. Leave default if not yet available.

name: P75 Forecast Telemetry Key
helpText: Telemetry key for daily P75 forecast.

name: P90 Forecast Telemetry Key
helpText: Telemetry key for daily P90 forecast.

name: P50 Annual Energy Attribute
helpText: Server attribute key for annual P50 energy (kWh). Used as fallback to derive daily forecasts.

name: P75 Annual Energy Attribute
helpText: Server attribute key for annual P75 energy (kWh).

name: P90 Annual Energy Attribute
helpText: Server attribute key for annual P90 energy (kWh).

name: Baseline Daily Energy (kWh)
helpText: Fallback daily energy baseline in kWh for pure simulation mode (when no attributes or telemetry are available). Divided by 1000 for MWh display.

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for tooltip and Y-axis values.

name: Show Confidence Band
helpText: Toggle the shaded area between P50 and P90 on the chart.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the card border glow accent (CSS color). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Text
helpText: Static tooltip override. Leave blank for auto-generated risk summary.
